title: Turkish-Style Kofte
description: A classic Turkish dish made with ground meat and spices, served with a side of garlic sauce.

ingredients.name: Ground Meat (Beef or Lamb)
ingredients.notes: You can use a combination of beef and lamb for a more authentic flavor.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground meat, chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped parsley, breadcrumbs, egg, salt, black pepper, paprika, and cumin. Mix everything together with your hands until just combined.
Don't overmix the mixture, as this can make the kofte dense and tough.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small meatballs, about 1 1/2 inches (3.8 cm) in diameter. You should end up with around 20-25 kofte.
Place the kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving a little space between each one to allow for even cooking.
Bake the kofte in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until they're cooked through and lightly browned on the outside.
While the kofte are baking, prepare the garlic sauce. Simply mix together 1/2 cup of mayonnaise, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 tablespoon of chopped parsley in a small bowl.
Once the kofte are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes on the baking sheet.
Serve the kofte hot with a dollop of garlic sauce on top. You can also serve them with a side of rice, salad, or grilled vegetables.
